decision_reason: Worker provided complete evidence bundle for Git pull, backend health, Ollama status, and candidate source files. One exception remains: direct Chroma command returned NotFound for lariel_site_kb while /health reports lariel_site_kb with 49 documents.
exception_notes: Chroma direct query failed: Collection [lariel_site_kb] does not exist
Backend /health reports collection lariel_site_kb with 49 documents
Likely cause: path/environment mismatch between Flask runtime Chroma path and shell command path
approved_actions: continue operations while treating Chroma direct-access check as degraded
